title: eval_script match: 4 of 5 arms map to SieveAction::Keep
description: evaluator.rs:90-98: None, Some(Continue), Some(Stop), and Some(Keep) all push SieveAction::Keep — four separate match arms with identical behavior. A catch-all arm makes the intent clearer: `let action = match eval_stmt_list(...) { Some(StmtResult::Discard) => SieveAction::Discard, Some(StmtResult::FileInto(f)) => SieveAction::FileInto(f), Some(StmtResult::Reject(r)) => SieveAction::Reject(r), _ => SieveAction::Keep }; vec![action]`
